_comment_mode:
MODE SWITCHER — change 'active' to switch pipeline:
  0 = Stock Footage (original: Pexels + history script)
  1 = Reddit Story  (r/TIFU + gameplay background loop)
  2 = Did You Know  (LLM facts + gameplay background loop)

mode._comment_upgraded_subtitles: true = chunked + colored captions (Mode 3 upgrade) for ALL modes

mode0_stock_footage._comment_video_source: 'dynamic' = fetch from Pexels API | 'static' = use static_video_path

mode1_reddit_story._comment: Reddit story pipeline — scrapes r/TIFU or r/AmItheAsshole
mode1_reddit_story._comment_video_source: 'dynamic' = loop gameplay from Pexels API | 'static' = use static_video_path

mode2_did_you_know._comment: Did You Know pipeline — LLM generates shocking facts
mode2_did_you_know._comment_video_source: 'dynamic' = loop gameplay from Pexels API | 'static' = use static_video_path
mode2_did_you_know._comment_niche: Try: psychology, science, finance, history, nature

upgraded._comment_highlight: One word per chunk gets this color for emphasis

scheduler._comment_run_mode: scheduled = run once every X hours | continuous = run back-to-back with no gap
scheduler._comment_publish: Hour (UTC) to schedule the YouTube upload for. Only used when YouTube upload is enabled.
